chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 358 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 30.11.2022 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the petitioner for the time being does not press instant petition, as the petitioner would approach the concerned Revenue Officer for redressal of his grievance. Accordingly, the instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
